meta.title: Workflow 02 - Live onboarding: client, staff, guest

steps.name: 1. Clean site user data via admin schema reset
2. Prepare email listeners for client/staff/guest addresses
steps.message: Inbound listeners prepared by clearing log and validating config.

details.message: Account created. Please check your email and click the validation link before logging in.

steps.name: 4. Verify client validation email received
steps.message: Client validation email captured with URL.

steps.name: 5. Validate client account and login
steps.message: Client account validated and login confirmed.

steps.name: 6. Add staff1 and verify password setup email

details.subject: Enter or reset your AutomaticPeople password

steps.message: Staff invite and setup email verified.

steps.name: 7. Set staff password, login as staff, verify validated
8. Add guest1 from config and verify invite/setup email

details.note: Current implementation may not send password setup on guest create from config.

steps.message: No guest invite/setup email found in inbound log within timeout.

steps.name: 9. Login as guest and verify guest-only behavior and empty reservations
steps.message: Skipped by failure: no guest password setup URL available from step 8.
